name: 真 祖爾宛殲滅戰
mnemonic: B1 Sephirot 祖爾宛：Cosmic Weave 宇宙織 + Gevurah 嚴厲 + Force Against Might 力量爭。
notes: HW 3.2 HW 蛮神祖爾宛兵器隔離倉首戰（Lv 60）。Boss 依序為 Sephirot 祖爾宛。重點：依各 boss 機制走位、add 速秒、tankbuster 與 raidwide 配合減傷與團補。

mechanics.description: is a giant donut AoE emitted from Sophia with a safe spot just inside her hitbox.；場上範圍 AoE 預警，看圖示提前走位避開預兆範圍。
mechanics.name: Thunder III 雷光 III

mechanics.description: the lower-half of Sophia, will occasionally disappear from beneath her and materialize at the edges of the arena. After doing so, it will charge up；依預兆走位處理。
mechanics.name: Daughter 招式

mechanics.description: is much like the Daughter attack used by her lower half. Sophia herself will move to the eastern or western edge of the arena and charge a huge straig；依預兆走位處理。
mechanics.name: Sophia Rush 招式

mechanics.description: is a Paladin-based add that utilizes AoE attacks and a directional parry. Players who attack the wrong side during the parry-mechanic will be knocked；場上範圍 AoE 預警，看圖示提前走位避開預兆範圍。
mechanics.name: The First Demiurge 第一造物主

mechanics.description: is a Healer-based add which will heal the other adds and also uses a gaze mechanic to confuse any players looking directly at it. Ideally, this add sh；依預兆走位處理。
mechanics.name: The Second Demiurge 第二造物主

mechanics.description: is a Lancer-based add that will eventually drop a persistent ice puddle on the ground at its current position. Ideally, this add should be positioned；依預兆走位處理。
mechanics.name: The Third Demiurge 第三造物主

mechanics.description: have a value of 1 and can appear on both sides of the arena.；依預兆走位處理。
mechanics.name: Orange Meteors 隕石

mechanics.description: have a value of 3 and will only appear on one side.；依預兆走位處理。
mechanics.name: Blue Meteors 隕石

bosses.name: 祖爾宛
mnemonic: Sephirot 祖爾宛 機制：Cosmic Weave 宇宙織 + Gevurah 嚴厲 + Force Against Might 力量爭。
